title: 3.2inch Ceramic Mortar and Pestle Set, Pill Crusher, Spice Crusher, Ceramic Mixing Grinding Bowl Set, Include Brush and Spoon
description:
About this item
1. Made of good quality of porcelain. You can be firmly held in the hand.
2. Provides a simple way to crush and grind pills, spice,etc.
3. The mortar comes with a flat and unglazed bottom for stability.
4. Nice mortar with a pouring lip which also serves to hold the coordinating pestle in place.
5. You can get a brush and a pill spoon for additional requirements.
reviews_5s:
Sturdy and works well, a little bigger than I expected. Tea jug for scale. Quality is good, no complaints.I needed a small set to crush medicine for my foster cat. This set was perfect. The little brush was a good addition to get the powder out onto the cat's food. Easy to clean. Very durable. Small so it's easy to store when not needed.This is a small, sturdy bowl that comes with a small pestle, a brush for cleaning the pestle and a small spoon.
It works well.I use this every day 2 times for my mother’s medicine and supplements! It is just the right size and very good quality I really like that they include a brush and spoon tool I use them every day!Great productI got what I ordered. Perfect condition.I purchased this to grind a pill for my cat. As the pill is very small. I put some plastic wrap in the bowl to insure I didn't lose any of the medication. Both worked. This little mortar and pestle set is great for food items and it's so cute!Bowl was cracked in half on first order, return was easy and replacement was quick. No hassles. Product is as described and has made it much easier to adminster pill to our kitty.My sweet cat is on pills now and giving a cat a pill is extremely hard so I now grind it up mix it with a small amount of chicken Broth then suck it up in a syringe and squirt it in his little mouth.This mortar & pestle is perfect for crushing up medication into a powder! I also love mini things.
reviews_1s:
Firstly, my mother needs her aspirin crushed up and put into a drink, as she can’t swallow pills.

This mortar and pestle is very porous. We lost about 1/2 of an aspirin pill in the first crush. If you look at the photo, you’ll see the residue.

They give you a little crummy metal “spoon” and a “brush” to get the medicine off of the sides. But there’s still a ton of aspirin left.

Way more trouble than it’s worth. I’m going to just dissolve her aspirin in orange juice. I give up.
